mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment exceeds 8 percent, labor market slack suppresses wage growth and consumer spending, causing negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns occur in more than 55 percent of instances when UNRATE exceeds 8 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts signal a synchronized collapse in consumer and investment demand, causing negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint declines in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict negative returns with statistical significance at the 5 percent level.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and corporate output, generating positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative 5-day returns in more than 60 percent of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index above 215 signals accelerating inflation that forces markets to price in tighter monetary policy, depressing equity valuations.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL increases above 215 consistently precede positive 20-day returns in more than half of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment rate indicates labor market tightening and wage pressure, compressing corporate margins and yielding negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence fails to predict negative returns with a rank correlation below 0.05 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate earnings growth, driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows no statistically significant positive correlation with 20-day forward returns over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 95 indicates severe manufacturing contraction that triggers short-term risk-off positioning and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO below 95 is followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 50 percent of cases across all tested periods.
